raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Prescribing a value-aligned shift toward positive thought patterns as a means of achieving physical self-improvement",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Moral or emotional quality of thoughts exerts direct causal control over bodily health and appearance",
    "Unlawful or negative thoughts produce measurable physical decline",
    "Glad and beautiful thoughts produce measurable physical rejuvenation",
    "Such effects occur rapidly in response to mental commands"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a dualistic maxim linking mind to body but lacks specified causal mechanism",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "If interpreted as motivational guidance for cultivating constructive mental habits that support overall well-being and health behaviors",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If read as a literal medical claim that attributes disease solely to thought quality and thereby discourages evidence-based treatment"
}
